title: FunVisuals
description: Fun Visuals - A visual modification that adds many useful and beautiful features to the game. Released in beta on February 20, and may have bugs.
body:
![FunVisualsPreview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487bcddf186e4ab64477337d7d2219f96b22cc84.png)
<center>
  
![fabic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00cafc081fda6a47102728961fb5f7ce091c244b_0.webp)

</center>

![ServerComp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2a22f398df024ad1ef8ead3e04f024f3a757a10.png)
- **our mod does not contain any banned features on popular servers. But if you get banned - contact support in our discord**



![About FunVisuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/092817c302dbdead90aa1c02539b71966ad25da5.png)

- **Designed for singleplayer & multiplayer with friends**
- **Adds extensive visual effects with full customization**
- **good combat features that make PvP easier**
- **well-customizable functions, user-friendly GUI**

# Functions:
**WorldFeature** - Adds unique **3D** and **2D** particles to **your world**.

**Ambience** - **Customizable** time of day **in the world**

**Menu** - It's a very **simple module**: you can **customize** the **hood elements**. _To enable a specific hood element, right-click on the location where you want the hood element_.

**ShiftTAP** - Automatically **crouches when hitting a player**. **GIVES** an advantage in **PvP**: _you are less likely to be pushed away, and it is also harder to hit you due to the dynamics of your movements_

**PlayerBoxes** - draws the player's **3D hitbox**. you can adjust the **color/opacity** of the **fill or outline** _(not displayed on invisible players)_

**BlockOverlay** - beautiful **block outlines** with flexible **gradient settings**, as well as **fill + outline**, **outline only**, and **fill only** modes.

**AutoSpec** - automatically writes a **spec message** to the **global chat** using the **binding** you set.

**Prediction** - shows **where** an item **will land**: **ender pearl**, **snowball**, **arrow**, **potion**, **trident**, **item**

**ViewModel** - changes the **position of your hands**

**FTHelper** - it draws the **radius** of the **donate items** on the **FunTime**.

**AutoSwap** - **Automatically** swaps items in **your hands**. Helps in **PvP**.

**AspectRatio** - Changes the **screen resolution** by stretching the image **without losing quality** or **FPS**.

**CombatHelper** - Helps you **navigate PvP**, and **tells you which item to use** to win the match. It **assesses the situation perfectly** and **highlights the item you need to use**.

**DiscordRPC** - Changes your **Discord activity**, showing **everyone** that you're playing with **FunVisuals**!
